name: MuSe
changelog:
- History is now the home screen, with collapsible song details
- Quick links to Spotify, Apple Music, SoundCloud, and web search
- Export, import, or clear your history
- Album art saved with each song
- New Settings: listen duration, mic choice, and auto-listen on open
- Added a What's New screen
- Smoother listening waveform on the glasses

permissions.name: g2-microphone
permissions.desc: Listens briefly to identify the music playing around you.

permissions.name: phone-microphone
permissions.desc: Optional: listen with the phone's mic instead of the glasses.

permissions.name: network
permissions.desc: Sends an audio signature to identify the song and fetches album art.
